name: My work illness claim got denied in Ogden, what now?
description: Appeal to Labor Commission within 20 days with more proof.[2]

mainEntity.name: My work illness claim got denied in Ogden, what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal to Labor Commission within 20 days with more proof.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Appeal within 20 days to Utah Labor Commission; request hearing.[2] Denials often reversible with better evidence.[3] Key factors: New medicals, causation proof, prejudice argument. Hire attorney experienced in appeals; they handle paperwork and hearings effectively.
